_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Floors is an Interval (I) type per base-knowledge.md §3; value key `floors.count` (field name assumed -- base-knowledge.md doesn't document Google's exact field name for this type, 'count' chosen for consistency with steps' `steps.count`). Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.floorsPoint().
